goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 16:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'ely' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'price'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 1'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 16:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to ely and should leave on monday
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and price
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 1
The hotel should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 3
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
